i %3C size; i++%7B%0A            curr := queue%5B0%5D%0A            queue = queue%5B1:%5D%0A%0A            for _, d := range dirs %7B%0A                nr, nc := curr.r+d.r, curr.c+d.c%0A%0A                if nr %3E= 0 && nr %3C m && nc %3E= 0 && nc %3C n && grid%5Bnr%5D%5Bnc%5D == 1 %7B%0A%09%09%09%09%09grid%5Bnr%5D%5Bnc%5D = 2               %0A%09%09%09%09%09freshCout--                  %0A%09%09%09%09%09queue = append(queue, Pos%7Bnr, nc%7D)%0A%09%09%09%09%7D%0A            %7D%0A        %7D%0A    %7D%0A    if freshCout == 0%7B%0A        return minutes%0A    %7D%0A    return -1%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc main()%7B%0A    scanner := bufio.NewScanner(os.Stdin)%0A    if !scanner.Scan()%7B%0A        return%0A    %7D%0A    parts := strings.Fields(scanner.Text())%0A    if len(parts) %3C 2%7B%0A        return%0A    %7D%0A%0A    nl, _ := strconv.Atoi(parts%5B0%5D)%0A    nc, _ := strconv.Atoi(parts%5B1%5D)%0A%0A    grid := make(%5B%5D%5B%5Dint, nl)%0A    for i := 0;
